untranslatable_reason: Johansen cointegration test requires multivariate statistical analysis of eigenvector decomposition across multiple price series. This cannot be expressed using the allowed indicators (which are univariate technical indicators: RSI, MACD, Bollinger Bands, etc.) and simple comparison operators (>, <, crosses_above, etc.). The signal requires: (1) calculation of cointegration rank 'r' via Johansen trace/eigen statistics, (2) eigenvector extraction from eigendecomposition of Λ matrix, (3) dynamic hedge ratio calculation. These are portfolio-level statistical operations requiring external cointegration library (jplv7), not single-bar technical indicator comparisons.
translation_notes: This is a regime-detection signal for identifying stationary cointegrated portfolios, not a tradeable entry/exit condition. It requires statistical analysis outside the scope of this rules engine. Recommend: (1) pre-process signal externally using Johansen test to identify cointegrated instrument sets, (2) once cointegration confirmed, implement spread trading separately, or (3) add a 'statistical_test' operator type to support eigenvalue-based conditions. Current allowed indicators cannot replicate multivariate cointegration detection.
